'''âsh-f-d-ch''' ('''kashafdechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:beak|beak]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-d-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:beak|beak]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-f-d-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kashafdechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishafdechoko|thishafdechoko]] || [[word:jishafdechoko|jishafdechoko]] || [[word:shishafdechoko|shishafdechoko]] || [[word:kishafdechoko|kishafdechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushafdechoko|thuthushafdechoko]] || [[word:jujushafdechoko|jujushafdechoko]] || [[word:shushushafdechoko|shushushafdechoko]] || [[word:kukushafdechoko|kukushafdechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshafdechoko|thoshafdechoko]] || [[word:joshafdechoko|joshafdechoko]] || [[word:shoshafdechoko|shoshafdechoko]] || [[word:koshafdechoko|koshafdechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
